arts.ttl: Why Manchester City's Erling Haaland won't be sending Portsmouth's latest signing any good-luck messages after free transfer move to Fratton Park
arts.sum: It would be safe to assume that Manchester City striker Erling Haaland won’t be sending Pompey new-boy Alexander Milosevic any good luck messages following his move to English football on Friday.

arts.ttl: Portsmouth sign ex-Nottingham Forest defender before Leeds United visit
arts.sum: Head coach John Mousinho said: "The injuries we’ve suffered means we’re short on defensive options going into the final stage of the campaign. Milosevic, who enjoyed three spells at Swedish top-flight side AIK, helping them to the league title in 2018, may line up against United as long as his international clearance is granted in time for the clash.

arts.ttl: Daniel Farke sends Mateo Joseph 'best behaviour' message amid meagre Leeds United goals tally
arts.sum: “Also, once an offensive player comes on, he is not cheating a bit with the work against the ball and waiting for his big moment to score and assist. Farke outlined that he has been pleased with how Joseph has fared in his recent outings and encouraged him to continue to be positive, insisting that goals will then naturally come.

arts.ttl: 'The bigger game is Plymouth' - why Portsmouth will still go full-throttle against Leeds United despite importance of forthcoming fixture against Pilgrims
arts.sum: Pompey fans looking forward to Sunday’s visit of Leeds United to Fratton Park can expect a full-throttle approach from John Mousinho’s side.

arts.ttl: Potential Leeds United XI vs Portsmouth with Aaronson and Joseph calls made
arts.sum: Predicted Leeds United XI: Meslier; Bogle, Rodon, Struijk, Firpo; Tanaka, Rothwell; James, Aaronson, Solomon; Piroe. There is no indication that any of Joel Piroe, Manor Solomon, Brenden Aaronson and February Championship player of the month Daniel James will be dropped.

arts.ttl: Who is Peter McCormick? Ex-Premier League chief confirmed as new Leeds United director
arts.sum: Leeds United have appointed Peter McCormick as their new executive vice chairman, as chief executive Angus Kinnear prepares to depart the club to join Everton. A club statement read: "Leeds United can confirm CEO Angus Kinnear will leave his position with the club at the end of the season.

arts.ttl: Tottenham could repeat Archie Gray transfer trick as another Leeds United star 'wanted'
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur have reportedly been linked with Leeds United defender Pascal Struijk as Ange Postecoglou's injuries woes continue in north London. What has changed this year, which is likely to help make Struijk want to stay in West Yorkshire, is that Leeds are looking strong gain automatic promotion to the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Portsmouth v Leeds United injury news: 11 out and 1 doubt
arts.sum: Pompey return to Fratton Park this Sunday as they welcome leaders Leeds United.

arts.ttl: Latest: Portsmouth plans over return transfer bid for West Ham loanee after outstanding Fratton stay
arts.sum: John Mousinho has revealed Pompey will launch a bid to bring Freddie Potts back to Fratton Park next season.

arts.ttl: Preview: Portsmouth vs. Leeds United - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Sunday's Championship clash between Portsmouth and Leeds United, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
